heading: From Learners to Speakers
subtitle: Real people, real transformations. Here's what Lingua learners are saying.

testimonials.quote: I was terrified of speaking English at work. After three months with Lingua, I led my first presentation — in English. The AI speech coach was a game-changer.
testimonials.name: Sofia Chen

testimonials.quote: The immersive stories are brilliant. I learned idioms and cultural nuances that textbooks never teach. Now I can laugh at British humor — and make it!
testimonials.name: Hiro Tanaka

testimonials.quote: Fifteen minutes a day, and within six months I went from 'Hello, my name is' to having full conversations with my English-speaking colleagues.
testimonials.name: Maria García
